activated_rules.rule_name: Consignor identified anywhere in invoice text
EU origin normalization against specific EU member state

consignor.invoice_value:
Elmo Sweden AB
SE-512 81 SVENLJUNGA
SWEDEN
consignor.motivation: Certificate consignor legal name 'Elmo Sweden AB' is explicitly present in the invoice footer/postal address block. This satisfies the special consignor rule allowing identification anywhere in the invoice text. No contradictory consignor identity appears.

consignee.certificate_value:
Al Muhalhel General Trading
& Contracting Co
Al Ardhiya Ind. Area. Block: 1
Building: 81
15257
KUWAIT
consignee.invoice_value:
Al Muhalhel General Trading &
Contracting Co
Al Ardhiya Ind. Area, Block:1
Building: 81
15257 - KUWAIT , Kuwait
consignee.motivation: The consignee name is explicitly identifiable in the invoice Ship-to block. The name matches after permitted normalization of line breaks, punctuation and spacing, and the country Kuwait is consistent.

goods_description.motivation: The identity-bearing goods description in the certificate is identifiable in the invoice line item as the same phrase after case and line-break normalization. The separate package text '5 Pkgs' does not alter the product identity.

quantity.motivation: The certificate quantity to be verified is the value in the dedicated quantity field. The exact same numeric value and unit, '288,610 M2', is present in the invoice line item.

origin.motivation: The certificate states origin as 'EUROPEAN UNION'. The invoice explicitly states 'Swedish Origin'. Sweden is an EU member state on the certificate issue date, so the certificate origin is verified by the invoice under the EU/member-state normalization rule. No non-EU origin contradicts this.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All applicable control points are verified as MATCH. The certificate consignor is explicitly found in the invoice footer, the consignee matches the invoice Ship-to block, the goods description and quantity match the invoice line item, and EU origin is explicitly supported by 'Swedish Origin' in the invoice.
